title: alchemilla alpestris var. effusa
intro: Alchemilla alpestris var. effusa, also known as the Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpestris var. effusa include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing irritation and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with digestive issues and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress. Alchemilla alpestris var. effusa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
